title: Circular of the GTA Chairman No. 5 of 2020
text:
// Logo of
State of
Chairman’s Office General Tax Authority Q a t a r / /
Mof-2020-18-270001
12-3-2020
Circular of the GTA Chairman No. 5 of 2020
Concerning the Extension of the Period for Submitting Tax Returns for the Tax Year 2019
M /s. Taxpayers and Auditors' Offices
Doha - Qatar
Greetings...
Due to the increasing correspondence received from the audit offices regarding the request to extend
the period of filing tax returns for the tax year 2019, taking into account the exceptional circumstances
experienced by the State during this period, and in an effort to promote the principle of tax compliance for
taxpayers,
We would like to inform you that it has been decided to postpone the deadline for filing tax returns
for the tax year 2019 for a period of two months. Hence, the last deadline for submitting tax returns is
30/6/2020.
All competent authorities, each according to its competence, shall apply this circular from the date of
its issuance.
Best Regards
//Signature Affixed//
Ahmed bin Issa Al Muhannadi
General Tax Authority Chairman
Issued on: 12/3/2020
Corresponding to / / H
